name: MISRA C: Static Analysis Before Commit
description: Source is checked against the MISRA C:2012 ruleset by static analysis before it is committed.
rationale: MISRA Compliance:2020 Guidelines Enforcement Plan (GEP): every guideline has a defined technical enforcement means; analysis must run before code is accepted.

examples.fails: the required compliance artifact/step is absent

source: MISRA Compliance:2020 — Achieving compliance with MISRA Coding Guidelines, applied to MISRA C:2012. https://misra.org.uk/
